CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(Confirmed_With_Employee__c) || sirenum__Cancelled__c, "-", IF( Confirmed_With_Employee__c && NOT(Confirmed_With_Facility__c), "Facility Pending", IF( Confirmed_With_Employee__c && Confirmed_With_Facility__c, "Facility Confirmed", "-" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Facility Confirmation Status
